chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2509 of 2022 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) For hearing of main case. 23-04-2025 None present for the petitioner Mr. Tahir Khalil Dogar, advocate for respondents This petition is pending since 2022 without any progress. Even today, after three years, petitioner remains unrepresented without any intimation or justification. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
